name: Create Campaign
description: Demonstrates the sequence of functions to create a new campaign, triggered by the GM.

sequence.action: Submits campaign creation request after GM fills form.
sequence.payload: Campaign Name, Description, Party Size, Party Level

sequence.action: Initializes the timeline by creating the first tick.
Confirms campaign creation and returns new campaign ID.
Navigates user to the new campaign's dashboard.

sequence_diagram_mermaid:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor GM
    participant Browser as PCOMP-001 (Boundary)
    participant AppServer as PCOMP-002 (Controller)
    participant Database as PCOMP-003 (Entity)

    GM->>+Browser: Submits 'New Campaign' Form
    Browser->>+AppServer: POST /campaigns (invokes LI-006)
    AppServer->>+Database: INSERT INTO campaigns...
    Database-->>-AppServer: {campaign_id}
    AppServer->>+AppServer: invokes LI-010: CreateNextTick
    AppServer->>+Database: INSERT INTO ticks...
    Database-->>-AppServer: {tick_id}
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns {campaign_id: ...}
    Browser->>-GM: Navigates to new Campaign Dashboard
```
